title: Quadlet - do not set log-driver by default
body:
Update e2e tests not to expect the flag
System tests - explicitly set the log driver to be able to parse the output

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?
Yes

```release-note
Quadlet no longer sets the log-driver by default
```

Resolves: #17692
